title: Payees
description: Manage your payees for easier transaction entry. Default payees can be hidden but not modified.
loadError: Failed to load payees. Please try again.

system.title: Default Payees ({{count}})
system.description: These are pre-loaded common payees. You can hide/show them but cannot modify or delete them.

form.name: Payee Name *
form.categoryHelp: Transactions with this payee will auto-fill this category
form.logoHelp: PNG, JPEG, WebP, or SVG. Max 500KB. Recommended: 128x128px.
form.logoInvalidType: Invalid file type. Please use PNG, JPEG, WebP, or SVG.
form.logoTooLarge: File too large. Maximum size is 500KB.
form.logoReadError: Failed to read file. Please try again.
form.saveFailed: Failed to save payee. Please try again.
form.duplicateName: A payee with this name already exists.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Payee
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
